title: Kere Basadi
tagline: Kere Basadi — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Kere Basadi (meaning: Lake temple) or Chaturmukha Basadi is a Jain temple located in Varanga village in Udupi district of Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Kere Basadi (meaning: Lake temple) or Chaturmukha Basadi is a Jain temple located in Varanga village in Udupi district of Karnataka, India. This 12th-century temple is situated amidst of a lake giving it the name Kere Basadi (lake temple). The temple is also known Chaturmukha Basadi as it houses a chaturmukha (four-faced) idol of tirthankaras. The temple is situated 26 km from Karkala, another popular Jain centre.

topPlaces.name: Varanga
topPlaces.description: Varanga is a village in Karkala Taluk in Udupi district of Karnataka, India. According to the 2011 census, it has a population of 4,011.

topPlaces.name: Hebri
topPlaces.description: Hebri is a town and taluk headquarters of Hebri taluk in the Udupi district of Karnataka state, at the foot of the Western Ghats of Republic of India . Hebri taluk was carved as a separate revenue taluk from Karkala taluk in the year 2018 A.D..

items.note: Varanga is a village in Karkala Taluk in Udupi district of Karnataka, India. According to the 2011 census, it has a population of 4,011.

Hebri is a town and taluk headquarters of Hebri taluk in the Udupi district of Karnataka state, at the foot of the Western Ghats of Republic of India . Hebri taluk was carved as a separate revenue taluk from Karkala taluk in the year 2018 A.D..

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kere Basadi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kere Basadi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kere Basadi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (50 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kere Basadi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kere Basadi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kere Basadi?
faq.a: Stays in Kere Basadi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kere Basadi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Varanga, Hebri.
